title: Lendingkart Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lendingkart Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lendingkart Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
